heading: Composition of boards
label: 2161 Composition of boards
notes: Amendments2025—Subsecs. (a), (b). substituted “section 2158 or 2159” for “section 2158, 2159, or 2160”.Pub. L. 119–602021—Subsec. (b). substituted “individual” for “person”.Pub. L. 116–2832018—, substituted “section 2158, 2159, or 2160” for “section 321, 322, or 323” in subsecs. (a) and (b).Pub. L. 115–282, § 123(b)(2), renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282, § 112(b)section 324 of this title
amendments: Amendments2025—Subsecs. (a), (b). substituted “section 2158 or 2159” for “section 2158, 2159, or 2160”.Pub. L. 119–602021—Subsec. (b). substituted “individual” for “person”.Pub. L. 116–2832018—, substituted “section 2158, 2159, or 2160” for “section 321, 322, or 323” in subsecs. (a) and (b).Pub. L. 115–282, § 123(b)(2), renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282, § 112(b)section 324 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: A board convened under section 2158 or 2159 of this title shall consist of at least three officers of the grade of commander or above, all of whom are serving in a grade senior to the grade of any officer considered by the board.

children.label: b
children.text: No individual may be a member of more than one board convened under section 2158 or 2159 of this title to consider the same officer.
